features: 💖To Our Daughter Gift : This unique and decorative daughter plaque is a perfect addition to any home decor.With its elegant design and personalized touch.A very nice gift to express the love to your daughter on Birthday,Christmas Day,Graduation or any occasion.

💖To Our Daughter Plaque: "To our daughter never forget that we love you. If we could give you one thing in life,we would give you the ability to see yourself through our eyes.Only then would you realize how special you are to us.Love, Mum & Dad. "The words on the plaque are clear and meaningful,perfect as Daughter Birthday gift,Daughter Christmas Gift,Daughter Wedding Day Gift.
💖Acrylic Material: Made from high-quality acrylic,it is durable and long-lasting,ensuring you will cherish it for years to come.

💖To Our Daughter Plaque Gifts:You can put it in the living room, bedroom, desk, office and other places to see.This stunning plaque is a beautiful addition to any home decor and will serve as a constant reminder.
💖Tips: There is a protective film on the front of the plaque, and the protective film on the front needs to be torn off before use.
